text: As I sit and observe this modern, brightly lit space, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The glass walls offer transparency, both literal and figurative, inviting me to enter the room beyond. It feels like I am on the threshold of discovery, surrounded by the symbols of human progress—design, research, and safety. There is an organized calmness here, but the tilted perspective hints at a world not quite settled, shifting toward new ideas.
